blocks.text: Reitan Stuns Augusta While West Ham Punish Wolves
⛳ Masters R3: McIlroy leads at -12 — Reitan surges to T10 (-4), wowing Norwegian experts with giant strides at Augusta

Kristoffer Reitan was the Friday story at Augusta. The Norwegian youngster's third-round -4 had experts reaching for superlatives — TV2 called it 'helt vilt', NRK quoted a friend's goosebumps. McIlroy commands at -12, but Reitan has made Augusta believers of us all.

blocks.label: Friday Football
items: ⚽ West Ham 4-0 Wolves (PL) — hammers batter the bottom side, dragging Tottenham below the relegation line
⚽ Real Madrid 1-1 Girona (La Liga) — another dropped home points, a third successive setback for Madrid

blocks.text: A forgettable evening for Real Madrid, held by mid-table Girona as Barcelona's lead stretches. In London, West Ham's demolition of Wolves had a cruel knock-on: Tottenham are now in the drop zone.
